title: Restore Create billable package menu
description:
Right-click a folder in PipeShare again shows Create billable package… and opens the full billable package wizard (copy videos/reports/images to the customer folder and link the WinCan .db3).

The temporary Folder DB3 strip that was mounted in the explorer is removed. Folder DB3 can still be set from the right-click DB3 menu when needed. Create new project structure no longer pops a DB3 prompt.

Who is affected: PipeShare on BASE (and SaaS after Push) for employees/admins packaging customer jobs.
changeLog: Restore right-click Create billable package… on folders (customer and employee menus).
Re-wire the billable package wizard, cloud copy queue, and post-copy DB3 binding.
Remove the explorer Folder DB3 strip UI.
Stop prompting for DB3 after Create new project structure.
